title: Typedown Schema
description: Schema for typedown document type definitions (.typedown/*.yaml). The filename stem is the type name; documents declare 'type: <name>' in frontmatter or are matched by path patterns.

description.description: Human-readable description of this document type. Documentation only — ignored by the engine.

paths.description: Glob patterns for files this schema applies to, relative to the .typedown/ parent directory. When a file matches and has no 'type:' frontmatter, this schema applies automatically. Supports *, **, ?. Example: '**/AGENTS.md', '.claude/commands/*.md'.

fields.description: Typed frontmatter field definitions. Keys are frontmatter field names. Use for type validation and enum constraint checking.

field_def.description: Definition of a typed frontmatter field.

type.description: Field type. 'date' expects YYYY-MM-DD; 'datetime' expects YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM; 'link' expects a relative path; 'enum' requires 'values'; 'list' requires 'item_type'.

required.description: Whether this field must be present in the document's frontmatter.

values.description: Allowed values. Required when type is 'enum'. Also required when type is 'list' and item_type is 'enum'.

item_type.description: Element type for list fields. Required when type is 'list'. Nested lists are not supported.

title.description: H1 title validation mode. Named modes: 'none' (no validation, default), 'from_filename' (H1 must match filename stem), 'from_directory' (H1 must match parent directory name), 'from_project' (H1 must match project name or frontmatter 'name' field), 'from_date' (H1 derived from YYYY-MM filename, e.g. '2026-02.md' → 'February 2026'), 'required' (H1 must exist). Any other string is treated as fixed text — auto-created if missing.

frontmatter.description: Ordered list of frontmatter fields for serialization order and presence checks. For type/value validation use 'fields' instead.

intro.description: Content between H1 and the first H2. The section's 'title' field is unused here.

sections.description: H2 section definitions. When strict_sections is true (default), order is enforced and unlisted sections are rejected.

strict_sections.description: When true (default), sections must appear in schema-defined order and unlisted H2s are rejected. Set false to allow freeform sections.

validate_all_links.description: When true (default), all links in the document are checked for existence.

size_warning.description: Emit a warning if the file exceeds this many bytes. Useful for documents that should stay concise (e.g. AGENTS.md).

date_headings.description: Date-based H2 heading validation. When set, every H2 must be a date (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM). Mutually exclusive with 'sections'.

section_def.description: Definition of a document section (H2 heading and its content).

title.description: Exact H2 heading text. Must match the markdown heading exactly. Unused for 'intro'.

bullets.description: Restrict content to bullet lists only. 'any' (or true) allows any list type; 'ordered' requires numbered lists; 'unordered' requires dash lists. Default: omitted (paragraphs and any content allowed). A 'template' field implicitly enables unordered bullet mode.

required.description: Whether this section must be present in the document.

template.description: Expected format for list items, validated against each bullet. Recognises '[text](url)' as a link placeholder, 'YYYY-MM-DD' as a date placeholder, and free text otherwise.

intro_text.description: Required introductory paragraph prefix for this section. Auto-inserted by 'td fmt' if missing.

target_type.description: Links in this section must point to documents of this schema type (the filename stem of a .typedown/*.yaml file).

bidirectional.description: When true, linked documents must also link back to this document.

managed_content.description: Auto-managed section content. The validator checks the section matches the template and 'td fmt' rewrites it. Content appended after the template is preserved.

template.description: Markdown template the section must start with. Include the H2 heading line.

migrate_from.description: Legacy section titles to automatically rename to this section's title.

date_headings_def.description: Configuration for date-based H2 headings (journals, changelogs, meeting notes).

sort.description: Sort order for date entries. 'newest_first' (default) is reverse chronological. 'oldest_first' is chronological (e.g. changelogs).

frontmatter_field_def.description: A frontmatter field declaration for serialization ordering and presence checks. For type/value validation use the top-level 'fields' map.

required.description: Whether this field must be present in the document's frontmatter.

description.description: Documentation for this field. Ignored by the engine; useful as LLM guidance.
